india_trends.title: India seals FTA with New Zealand, gets $20 bn investment pledge, duty-free access
india_trends.summary: The agreement comes at a time of evolving global and regional dynamics, with New Zealand viewing India as a key partner in promoting regional stability, economic resilience and shared prosperity.

india_trends.title: Shivraj Singh Chouhan to launch 330 new road projects costing Rs 3,550 crore in Jammu & Kashmir
india_trends.summary: The Batch-II under the PMGSY-IV will accelerate development in Jammu and Kashmir through the construction of 330 new roads covering 1,600 kilometres at a project cost of Rs 3,550 crore, benefiting 363 habitations across the region, an official spokesman here said.

india_trends.title: Bernstein sees signs of an improving and fundamentally stronger crypto market
Small-cap stock under ₹50 hits 5% upper circuit after Q4 results 2024
india_trends.summary: AVI Polymers reached its 5% upper circuit limit, closing at ₹17.26 due to strong Q4 results, with revenue up 13.6% and net profit rising 46.1%. The company reported impressive FY26 growth, achieving a net profit of ₹20.33 crore and a 20.5-fold increase in net worth.

india_trends.title: Mobikwik expects to see better margins after RBI nod for NBFC arm
india_trends.summary: Currently, the firm has a user base of around 186 million and 4.79 million merchants across products by April 2026 mainly in tier two and three India.

india_trends.title: India-New Zealand FTA to give major boost to exports: Experts
india_trends.summary: India and New Zealand have signed a free trade agreement. This pact offers duty-free access for all Indian goods to New Zealand. Experts believe this will significantly boost domestic exports. The agreement also opens doors for Indian professionals and attracts substantial investment. Key sectors li

india_trends.title: Wall Street edges lower as investors await big earnings amid stalled US-Iran talks
india_trends.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.24%, the S&amp;P 500 fell 0.17%, the Nasdaq Composite dropped 0.15%

india_trends.title: SEBI conducts searches at promoter premises of RM Drip, R&B Denims
india_trends.summary: The action, carried out under provisions of the SEBI Act, is linked to suspected stock price manipulation and alleged pump-and-dump activity in SME-listed stocks

india_trends.title: MoSPI proposes Index of Service Production with 2024-25 as base year
india_trends.summary: The Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation has proposed creating an Index of Services Production (ISP) for the formal sector using GST data, with 2024–25 as the base year. The index will track key service segments such as trade, transport, banking, insurance, hospitality, real estate, a

india_trends.title: General Atlantic-backed Indian insurer Acko eyes up to $2.5 billion valuation in IPO, sources say
india_trends.summary: India's Acko Insurance ​is targeting a valuation of between $2 ​billion and $2.5 billion in its planned initial public offering ​and is eyeing a listing in early 2027, two people familiar with the matter said.

india_trends.title: Broker’s Call: DCB Bank (Buy)
Global Stocks: Canada to set up sovereign wealth fund with initial funding of C$25 billion
india_trends.summary: Canada ​will set up a ​sovereign wealth fund with an initial endowment of C$25 billion ($18.38 billion) to invest in major ‌domestic ⁠projects, Prime ⁠Minister Mark Carney told reporters on ​Monday.

india_trends.title: India, Russia-led EAEU may hold next round talks for trade pact in June
india_trends.summary: India and the Russia-led Eurasian Economic Union are set to hold the next round of talks on a proposed free trade agreement in June in Moscow, with discussions expected to focus on non-trade measures. The two sides signed terms of reference in August 2025 and began negotiations in November, aiming t

india_trends.title: US Stocks: US market opens lower as investors weigh the US-Iran conflict before earnings rush
india_trends.summary: U.S. stock indexes opened lower on Monday as stalled peace talks with Iran and anticipation of corporate earnings and Federal Reserve commentary weighed on sentiment. The Dow Jones Industrial Average, S&P 500, and Nasdaq Composite all saw modest declines in early trading.

india_trends.title: Monarch Networth Capital raises Rs 100 crore for its maiden PMS scheme
india_trends.summary: Monarch Networth Capital raised Rs 100 crore for its maiden PMS fund via direct distribution. The fund outperformed its benchmark with strong returns, and the firm now targets Rs 500 crore AUM, backed by a research-driven investment strategy and growth plans.

india_trends.title: Adani Total Gas Q4 Results: Profit grows 9% YoY to ₹168 crore, revenue up 16.6%; margins contract
india_trends.summary: Adani Total Gas reported a Q4 net profit of ₹168.34 crore, up 9% year-on-year. Revenue rose 16.62% to ₹1,694.61 crore, while EBITDA increased to ₹300.32 crore. The EBITDA margin decreased to 17.72% from 18.30% last year.

world_trends.title: Microsoft and OpenAI aren’t breaking up. But they’re not exclusive anymore.
world_trends.summary: The companies agreed to a deal that they said gives them more flexibility. As part of it, Microsoft will stop sharing its revenue.
